suggest.codewithkyrian/chromadb-php: This is required for the ChromaDBVectorStore.
suggest.doctrine/mongodb-odm: This is required for the DoctrineODMVectoreStore. This should be working with any version ^2.16.1
suggest.doctrine/orm: This is required for the DoctrineVectoreStore. This should be working with any version ^2.13.0
suggest.elasticsearch/elasticsearch: This is required for the ElasticsearchVectoreStore.
suggest.hkulekci/qdrant: This is required for the QdrantVectoreStore.
suggest.opensearch-project/opensearch-php: This is required for the OpenSearchVectorStore.
suggest.predis/predis: This is required for the RedisVectoreStore.
suggest.probots-io/pinecone-php: This is required for the PineconeVectorStore. Use scotteuser/pinecone-php for <= PHP 8.2
suggest.symfony/cache: This is one of the possible types of psr/cache needed by doctrine/orm
